steps.title: Identify constant rate of change
steps.content: The airplane descends at a constant rate of $400$ feet per minute. Constant amount of change per minute means linear. Exponential would mean a constant percent change, which is not what the problem says.

steps.title: Build a quick Desmos table
steps.content: Use a few time-altitude points: at $0$ minutes the altitude is $9500$, at $1$ minute it is $9100$, and at $2$ minutes it is $8700$. A linear regression on those points gives slope $-400$, confirming a decreasing linear model.

steps.title: Conclusion
steps.content: The relationship is linear because the rate is constant, and it is decreasing because altitude goes down as time increases. That matches choice B.
